---
title: "Marriages — DEMOPAST (test)"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.4.4/dist/chart.umd.min.js"></script>
---

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css" />
<script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/papaparse@5.4.1/papaparse.min.js"></script>

<div style="background:#fff3cd;border:1px solid #ffeeba;border-radius:4px;padding:0.5rem 1rem;margin-bottom:1rem;font-size:0.9rem;">
  <strong>Test section</strong> — marriages from ISTAT <em>Movimento dello stato civile</em> volumes.
  Use the <strong>Geography</strong> toggle to switch between <em>province</em> (fine detail, boundaries
  changing over time) and <em>compartimento</em> (sum of the constituent provinces, geography stable across
  the whole period; the map is then shaded by region). The available years and colour scale adjust to the
  selected level. <a href="index.html">← back to test home</a>
</div>

<div id="noData" style="display:none;background:#e7f1ff;border:1px solid #b6d4fe;border-radius:4px;padding:1rem;margin-bottom:1rem;">
  <strong>Data extraction in progress.</strong> Provincial marriage tables (1862–1961) are being digitised
  from the <em>Movimento dello stato civile</em> volumes and the <em>Annuari di Statistiche Demografiche</em>.
  This page will populate automatically once <code>data/marriages/marriages_panel.csv</code> is published.
</div>

<div class="slider-container">
  <label for="yearSlider" class="year-label">Year: <span id="yearDisplay">—</span></label><br>
  <input type="range" id="yearSlider" min="0" max="0" step="1" value="0" style="width:60%;max-width:500px;">
  <div id="yearTicks" style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;max-width:500px;margin:0 auto;"></div>
</div>

<div style="text-align:center;margin:1rem 0;">
  <label for="indSelect" style="font-weight:bold;">Indicator: </label>
  <select id="indSelect" style="padding:4px 8px;font-size:1rem;">
    <option value="nuptiality">Crude Marriage Rate (marriages / 1,000 pop.)</option>
    <option value="marriages">Total marriages</option>
  </select>
  &nbsp;&nbsp;
  <label style="font-weight:bold;">Geography: </label>
  <label style="margin-right:0.5rem;"><input type="radio" name="geoLevel" value="prov" checked> Province</label>
  <label><input type="radio" name="geoLevel" value="comp"> Compartimento</label>
</div>

<div style="display:flex;gap:1.5rem;align-items:flex-start;">
  <div style="flex:0 0 38%;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.75rem;">
    <div id="map" style="width:100%;height:560px;"></div>
    <div id="legendWrapper">
      <div class="legend-header">
        <span class="legend-title">Legend</span>
        <button id="legendToggle" type="button">Hide</button>
      </div>
      <div id="legendContent" class="map-legend"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div id="provinceInfo" style="flex:0 0 59%;padding:1rem;background:#f8f9fa;border-radius:4px;display:none;max-height:700px;overflow-y:auto;">
    <h4 id="provName" style="margin-top:0;"></h4>
    <table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:0.9rem;">
      <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #eee;"><td style="padding:3px 4px;">Crude Marriage Rate (‰)</td><td id="provRate" style="text-align:right;padding:3px 4px;font-weight:bold;"></td></tr>
      <tr><td style="padding:3px 4px;">Total marriages</td><td id="provCount" style="text-align:right;padding:3px 4px;font-weight:bold;"></td></tr>
    </table>
    <h5 style="margin-top:1rem;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Marriage rate over time</h5>
    <div><canvas id="seriesChart" style="max-height:240px;"></canvas></div>
    <div id="ageDistBlock" style="display:none;margin-top:1.25rem;">
      <div><canvas id="ageDistChart" style="max-height:260px;"></canvas></div>
      <p id="ageDistNote" style="margin-top:0.4rem;font-size:0.8rem;color:#666;"></p>
    </div>
    <p id="ageDistMsg" style="display:none;margin-top:1.25rem;font-size:0.9rem;color:#666;font-style:italic;"></p>
    <div style="margin-top:0.75rem;font-size:0.9rem;">
      <a href="../data/marriages/marriages_panel.csv" download>marriages_panel.csv</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const PANEL = 'marriages';
const COUNT_FIELD = 'marriages';
const RATE_FIELD = 'nuptiality';
const SERIES_LABEL = 'marriages per 1,000 pop.';
const LINE_COLOR = '#2171b5';
const HOVER_COLOR = '#1e3a8a';
const COLORS = ['#f7fbff','#deebf7','#c6dbef','#9ecae1','#6baed6','#4292c6','#2171b5','#084594'];
const GEO_AVAILABLE = [1861, 1871, 1881, 1901, 1911, 1921, 1931];
// years for which a real compartimento (region) geojson exists
const COMP_GEO_YEARS = [1871, 1881, 1901, 1911, 1921, 1931, 1936];
const DATA_URL = '../data/' + PANEL + '/' + PANEL + '_panel.csv';
const COMP_URL = '../data/' + PANEL + '/' + PANEL + '_comp.csv';
// age-at-marriage distribution by compartimento (see notes at bottom of page)
const AGE_URL = '../data/marriages/marriage_age_comp.csv';
// 1890 excluded: it is tabulated by year of birth, not standard age classes
const AGE_YEARS_OK = new Set([1894, 1895, 1900, 1901, 1911]);
const AGE_GROOM_COLOR = '#2171b5';
const AGE_BRIDE_COLOR = '#e6550d';

// COD_PROV -> compartimento (geography stable across years)
const PROV_COMP = {1:"PIEMONTE", 2:"PIEMONTE", 3:"PIEMONTE", 4:"PIEMONTE", 5:"PIEMONTE", 6:"PIEMONTE", 7:"PIEMONTE", 8:"LIGURIA", 9:"LIGURIA", 10:"LIGURIA", 11:"LIGURIA", 12:"LOMBARDIA", 13:"LOMBARDIA", 14:"LOMBARDIA", 15:"LOMBARDIA", 16:"LOMBARDIA", 17:"LOMBARDIA", 18:"LOMBARDIA", 19:"LOMBARDIA", 20:"LOMBARDIA", 21:"VENEZIA TRIDENTINA", 22:"VENEZIA TRIDENTINA", 23:"VENETO", 24:"VENETO", 25:"VENETO", 26:"VENETO", 27:"VENETO", 28:"VENETO", 29:"VENETO", 30:"VENETO", 31:"VENEZIA GIULIA E ZARA", 32:"VENEZIA GIULIA E ZARA", 33:"EMILIA", 34:"EMILIA", 35:"EMILIA", 36:"EMILIA", 37:"EMILIA", 38:"EMILIA", 39:"EMILIA", 40:"EMILIA", 41:"MARCHE", 42:"MARCHE", 43:"MARCHE", 44:"MARCHE", 45:"TOSCANA", 46:"TOSCANA", 47:"TOSCANA", 48:"TOSCANA", 49:"TOSCANA", 50:"TOSCANA", 51:"TOSCANA", 52:"TOSCANA", 53:"TOSCANA", 54:"UMBRIA", 55:"UMBRIA", 56:"LAZIO", 57:"LAZIO", 58:"LAZIO", 59:"LAZIO", 60:"LAZIO", 61:"CAMPANIA", 62:"CAMPANIA", 63:"CAMPANIA", 64:"CAMPANIA", 65:"CAMPANIA", 66:"ABRUZZI E MOLISE", 67:"ABRUZZI E MOLISE", 68:"ABRUZZI E MOLISE", 69:"ABRUZZI E MOLISE", 70:"ABRUZZI E MOLISE", 71:"PUGLIE", 72:"PUGLIE", 73:"PUGLIE", 74:"PUGLIE", 75:"PUGLIE", 76:"BASILICATA", 77:"BASILICATA", 78:"CALABRIE", 79:"CALABRIE", 80:"CALABRIE", 81:"SICILIA", 82:"SICILIA", 83:"SICILIA", 84:"SICILIA", 85:"SICILIA", 86:"SICILIA", 87:"SICILIA", 88:"SICILIA", 89:"SICILIA", 90:"SARDEGNA", 91:"SARDEGNA", 92:"SARDEGNA"};

const map = L.map('map', {zoomControl:false, attributionControl:false, dragging:false,
  scrollWheelZoom:false, doubleClickZoom:false, boxZoom:false, keyboard:false,
  touchZoom:false}).setView([41.5, 12.5], 6);

let YEARS = [];
let panel = {};        // year -> COD_PROV -> {den, count, rate}  (province level)
let comp = {};         // compartimento -> year -> {count, rate}  (comp series + side panel + map)
let yearsProv = [], yearsComp = [];
let geojsonCache = {};       // province geojson (province view)
let compGeojsonCache = {};   // compartimento (region) geojson (comp view)
let currentLayer = null, currentBreaks = null, seriesChart = null;
let lastSelComp = null; // remember selected comp across year/indicator changes
let ageDist = {};        // COMP_UPPER -> year -> sex -> [{lo, label, count}]
let ageYearsByComp = {}; // COMP_UPPER -> sorted [years] with usable age data
let ageDistChart = null;

function level() { return document.querySelector('input[name="geoLevel"]:checked').value; }
function getField() { return document.getElementById('indSelect').value === RATE_FIELD ? 'rate' : 'count'; }
// comp value for a given compartimento name in the current year
function compVal(name, year, field) {
  const rec = (comp[name] || {})[year];
  return rec ? rec[field] : null;
}
function getYear() { return YEARS[document.getElementById('yearSlider').value]; }
function geoYear(y) {
  return GEO_AVAILABLE.reduce((a, b) => Math.abs(b - y) < Math.abs(a - y) ? b : a);
}
function fmt(n) { return (n == null || n === '') ? 'N/A' : Number(n).toLocaleString('en-US'); }

function rebuildYears(keepYear) {
  YEARS = (level() === 'comp' ? yearsComp : yearsProv).slice();
  const slider = document.getElementById('yearSlider');
  let idx = 0;
  if (keepYear != null && YEARS.length) {
    idx = YEARS.reduce((best, y, i) =>
      Math.abs(y - keepYear) < Math.abs(YEARS[best] - keepYear) ? i : best, 0);
  }
  slider.max = Math.max(0, YEARS.length - 1);
  slider.value = idx;
  const step = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(YEARS.length / 8));
  document.getElementById('yearTicks').innerHTML = YEARS.map((y, i) =>
    '<span>' + ((i % step === 0 || i === YEARS.length - 1) ? y : '') + '</span>').join('');
}

async function init() {
  let text = null;
  try {
    const resp = await fetch(DATA_URL);
    if (resp.ok) text = await resp.text();
  } catch (e) { /* missing file */ }
  if (!text || text.trim().startsWith('<')) {
    document.getElementById('noData').style.display = 'block';
    return;
  }
  Papa.parse(text, {header:true, skipEmptyLines:true, dynamicTyping:true}).data.forEach(function(r) {
    if (!panel[r.year]) panel[r.year] = {};
    panel[r.year][r.COD_PROV] = {den: r.DEN_PROV,
      count: r[COUNT_FIELD] || null, rate: r[RATE_FIELD] || null};
  });
  yearsProv = Object.keys(panel).map(Number).sort((a, b) => a - b);

  // compartimento layer (best-effort; if missing, comp toggle just shows no data)
  const compYearsWithData = new Set();
  try {
    const cTxt = await fetch(COMP_URL).then(r => r.ok ? r.text() : '');
    Papa.parse(cTxt, {header:true, skipEmptyLines:true, dynamicTyping:true}).data.forEach(function(r) {
      if (!r.compartimento) return;
      if (!comp[r.compartimento]) comp[r.compartimento] = {};
      comp[r.compartimento][r.year] = {count: r[COUNT_FIELD] || null, rate: r[RATE_FIELD] || null};
      if (r.year != null) compYearsWithData.add(Number(r.year));
    });
  } catch (e) { /* comp layer optional */ }

  // age-at-marriage distribution (compartimento view side panel; optional)
  try {
    const aTxt = await fetch(AGE_URL).then(r => r.ok ? r.text() : '');
    Papa.parse(aTxt, {header:true, skipEmptyLines:true, dynamicTyping:true}).data.forEach(function(r) {
      if (!r.compartimento || r.year == null || !r.sex) return;
      const year = Number(r.year);
      if (!AGE_YEARS_OK.has(year)) return;                 // skip 1890 / unexpected years
      const notes = (r.notes == null ? '' : String(r.notes)).toLowerCase();
      if (notes.indexOf('illegible') !== -1) return;       // skip unreadable cells
      if (r.count == null || r.count === '') return;       // skip empty counts
      const lo = r.age_lo;
      if (lo == null || lo === '') return;                 // skip 'ignota'/'age unknown'
      const key = String(r.compartimento).toUpperCase();
      const sex = String(r.sex).toUpperCase();
      if (!ageDist[key]) ageDist[key] = {};
      if (!ageDist[key][year]) ageDist[key][year] = {};
      if (!ageDist[key][year][sex]) ageDist[key][year][sex] = [];
      ageDist[key][year][sex].push({lo: Number(lo), label: r.age_group, count: Number(r.count)});
    });
    Object.keys(ageDist).forEach(k => {
      ageYearsByComp[k] = Object.keys(ageDist[k]).map(Number).sort((a, b) => a - b);
    });
  } catch (e) { /* age distribution optional */ }

  // comp slider = years with a real region geojson AND comp data
  yearsComp = COMP_GEO_YEARS.filter(y => compYearsWithData.has(y));

  rebuildYears(null);
  document.getElementById('yearSlider').addEventListener('input', updateMap);
  document.getElementById('indSelect').addEventListener('change', updateMap);
  document.querySelectorAll('input[name="geoLevel"]').forEach(el =>
    el.addEventListener('change', onLevelChange));
  updateMap();
}

function onLevelChange() {
  const cur = getYear();
  rebuildYears(cur);
  document.getElementById('provinceInfo').style.display = 'none';
  if (seriesChart) { seriesChart.destroy(); seriesChart = null; }
  hideAgeDist();
  updateMap();
}

function computeBreaks() {
  const field = getField();
  let values;
  if (level() === 'comp') {
    const y0 = YEARS[0];
    values = Object.keys(comp).map(name => compVal(name, y0, field))
      .filter(v => v != null && v > 0);
  } else {
    const base = panel[YEARS[0]] || {};
    values = Object.values(base).map(p => p[field]).filter(v => v != null && v > 0);
  }
  if (!values.length) return [0, 1];
  values.sort((a, b) => a - b);
  const breaks = [];
  for (let i = 1; i <= 7; i++) {
    breaks.push(values[Math.min(Math.floor(values.length * i / 8), values.length - 1)]);
  }
  return [...new Set(breaks)].sort((a, b) => a - b);
}

function getColor(v, breaks) {
  if (v == null) return '#e5e7eb';
  for (let i = breaks.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    if (v > breaks[i]) return COLORS[Math.min(i + 1, COLORS.length - 1)];
  }
  return COLORS[0];
}

function style(feature) {
  let v;
  if (level() === 'comp') {
    v = compVal(feature.properties.COMP, getYear(), getField());
  } else {
    const rec = (panel[getYear()] || {})[feature.properties.COD_PROV];
    v = rec ? rec[getField()] : null;
  }
  return {fillColor: getColor(v, currentBreaks),
          weight: 0.8, opacity: 1, color: '#94a3b8', fillOpacity: 0.85};
}

function showProvince(cod, name) {
  const rec = (panel[getYear()] || {})[cod];
  document.getElementById('provinceInfo').style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('provName').textContent = name + ' (' + getYear() + ')';
  document.getElementById('provRate').textContent = rec ? fmt(rec.rate) : 'N/A';
  document.getElementById('provCount').textContent = rec ? fmt(rec.count) : 'N/A';
  const data = YEARS.map(y => {
    const p = (panel[y] || {})[cod];
    return {x: y, y: p ? p.rate : null};
  }).filter(d => d.y != null);
  drawSeries(name, data);
  hideAgeDist(); // age distribution is a compartimento-only feature
}

function showComp(name) {
  lastSelComp = name;
  const series = comp[name] || {};
  const rec = series[getYear()];
  document.getElementById('provinceInfo').style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('provName').textContent = name + ' (compartimento, ' + getYear() + ')';
  document.getElementById('provRate').textContent = rec ? fmt(rec.rate) : 'N/A';
  document.getElementById('provCount').textContent = rec ? fmt(rec.count) : 'N/A';
  const data = Object.keys(series).map(Number).sort((a, b) => a - b)
    .map(y => ({x: y, y: series[y].rate})).filter(d => d.y != null && d.y !== '');
  drawSeries(name, data);
  showAgeDist(name);
}

// normalize a sex's age classes to shares (sum = 100) over readable cells
function ageShares(rows) {
  const total = rows.reduce((s, r) => s + r.count, 0);
  if (!(total > 0)) return {};
  const out = {};
  rows.forEach(r => { out[r.label] = (r.count / total) * 100; });
  return out;
}

function hideAgeDist() {
  document.getElementById('ageDistBlock').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('ageDistMsg').style.display = 'none';
  if (ageDistChart) { ageDistChart.destroy(); ageDistChart = null; }
}

function showAgeDist(name) {
  const block = document.getElementById('ageDistBlock');
  const msg = document.getElementById('ageDistMsg');
  const key = String(name).toUpperCase();
  const years = ageYearsByComp[key];
  if (!years || !years.length) {
    block.style.display = 'none';
    msg.style.display = 'block';
    msg.textContent = 'Age-at-marriage distribution not available for ' + name + '.';
    if (ageDistChart) { ageDistChart.destroy(); ageDistChart = null; }
    return;
  }
  const cur = getYear();
  // nearest available age-data year to the current slider year
  const useYear = years.reduce((a, b) => Math.abs(b - cur) < Math.abs(a - cur) ? b : a);
  const byYear = ageDist[key][useYear] || {};
  const grooms = byYear.M || [];
  const brides = byYear.F || [];

  // union of age classes, ordered by age_lo, labelled by age_group
  const labelByLo = {};
  grooms.concat(brides).forEach(r => { labelByLo[r.lo] = r.label; });
  const los = Object.keys(labelByLo).map(Number).sort((a, b) => a - b);
  const labels = los.map(lo => labelByLo[lo]);

  const gShare = ageShares(grooms);
  const bShare = ageShares(brides);
  const gData = labels.map(l => gShare[l] != null ? +gShare[l].toFixed(1) : null);
  const bData = labels.map(l => bShare[l] != null ? +bShare[l].toFixed(1) : null);

  msg.style.display = 'none';
  block.style.display = 'block';
  const note = document.getElementById('ageDistNote');
  note.textContent = (useYear === cur ? '' : 'Age data: ' + useYear + ' (nearest to ' + cur + '). ') +
    'Shares normalised to 100% over readable age classes; ages "ignota"/illegible excluded.';

  const title = 'Age distribution at marriage — ' + name + ' ' + useYear + ' (% of total)';
  const ctx = document.getElementById('ageDistChart').getContext('2d');
  if (ageDistChart) ageDistChart.destroy();
  ageDistChart = new Chart(ctx, {
    type: 'bar',
    data: {labels: labels, datasets: [
      {label: 'Grooms (M)', data: gData, backgroundColor: AGE_GROOM_COLOR},
      {label: 'Brides (F)', data: bData, backgroundColor: AGE_BRIDE_COLOR}
    ]},
    options: {responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
      plugins: {legend: {display: true, position: 'top'},
        title: {display: true, text: title, font: {size: 12}},
        tooltip: {callbacks: {label: c => c.dataset.label + ': ' +
          (c.parsed.y == null ? 'N/A' : c.parsed.y + '%')}}},
      scales: {x: {title: {display: true, text: 'Age class'}},
        y: {beginAtZero: true, title: {display: true, text: '% of marriages'}}}}
  });
}

function drawSeries(name, data) {
  const ctx = document.getElementById('seriesChart').getContext('2d');
  if (seriesChart) seriesChart.destroy();
  seriesChart = new Chart(ctx, {
    type: 'line',
    data: {datasets: [{label: '‰', data: data, borderColor: LINE_COLOR,
      backgroundColor: LINE_COLOR, pointRadius: 3, borderWidth: 1.5}]},
    options: {responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
      plugins: {legend: {display: false},
        title: {display: true, text: name + ' — ' + SERIES_LABEL, font: {size: 12}}},
      scales: {x: {type: 'linear', ticks: {callback: v => v}}, y: {beginAtZero: true}}}
  });
}

function onEachFeature(feature, layer) {
  layer.on({
    mouseover: function(e) { e.target.setStyle({weight: 2, color: HOVER_COLOR, fillOpacity: 1}); e.target.bringToFront(); },
    mouseout: function(e) { if (currentLayer) currentLayer.resetStyle(e.target); },
    click: function() {
      if (level() === 'comp') showComp(feature.properties.COMP);
      else showProvince(feature.properties.COD_PROV, feature.properties.DEN_PROV);
    }
  });
}

async function updateMap() {
  const year = getYear();
  document.getElementById('yearDisplay').textContent = year;
  let geojson;
  if (level() === 'comp') {
    if (!compGeojsonCache[year]) {
      compGeojsonCache[year] = await fetch('../data/geojson/compartimento_' + year + '.geojson').then(r => r.json());
    }
    geojson = compGeojsonCache[year];
  } else {
    const gy = geoYear(year);
    if (!geojsonCache[gy]) {
      geojsonCache[gy] = await fetch('../data/geojson/province_' + gy + '.geojson').then(r => r.json());
    }
    geojson = geojsonCache[gy];
  }
  currentBreaks = computeBreaks();
  if (currentLayer) map.removeLayer(currentLayer);
  currentLayer = L.geoJSON(geojson, {style: style, onEachFeature: onEachFeature}).addTo(map);
  map.fitBounds(currentLayer.getBounds(), {padding: [10, 10]});
  updateLegend();
  // refresh open side panel for the new year/indicator
  if (document.getElementById('provinceInfo').style.display === 'block' &&
      level() === 'comp' && lastSelComp) showComp(lastSelComp);
}

document.getElementById('legendToggle').addEventListener('click', function() {
  const hidden = document.getElementById('legendWrapper').classList.toggle('legend-hidden');
  this.textContent = hidden ? 'Show' : 'Hide';
});

function updateLegend() {
  const div = document.getElementById('legendContent');
  if (!div || !currentBreaks) return;
  const label = document.getElementById('indSelect').selectedOptions[0].text;
  const lvl = level() === 'comp' ? ' — compartimento' : '';
  let html = '<strong>' + label + lvl + '</strong>';
  html += '<div class="legend-row"><i style="background:' + COLORS[0] + '"></i><span>&lt; ' + fmt(currentBreaks[0]) + '</span></div>';
  for (let i = 0; i < currentBreaks.length; i++) {
    const next = currentBreaks[i + 1];
    const clr = COLORS[Math.min(i + 1, COLORS.length - 1)];
    html += next
      ? '<div class="legend-row"><i style="background:' + clr + '"></i><span>' + fmt(currentBreaks[i]) + '–' + fmt(next) + '</span></div>'
      : '<div class="legend-row"><i style="background:' + clr + '"></i><span>&gt; ' + fmt(currentBreaks[i]) + '</span></div>';
  }
  html += '<div class="legend-row"><i style="background:#e5e7eb"></i><span>no data</span></div>';
  div.innerHTML = html;
}

init();
</script>

<div style="margin-top:2rem;padding-top:1rem;border-top:1px solid #ddd;font-size:0.9rem;color:#555;">
<p><strong>Sources.</strong> Marriages: ISTAT/MAIC, <em>Movimento dello stato civile</em> —
annual series 1863–1881 (TAVOLA VI of the 1881 volume, cross-validated against the
checksum-validated births/deaths panel) and the 1901, 1911, 1921 and 1931 volumes.
Crude marriage rate = marriages / population × 1000, with population linearly interpolated
between flanking censuses. Pola, Trieste and Zara (1931) lack census denominators and are
included only in the full extraction file. The provincial map shows the nearest available historical
boundaries. The compartimento map uses the historical regional boundaries reconstructed from ISTAT
(<em>Annali di statistica</em>, 2018; CC-BY): regional polygons at the compartimento level, joined to
the data by region name.</p>
<p><strong>Download:</strong> <a href="../data/marriages/marriages_panel.csv" download>marriages_panel.csv</a> ·
<a href="../data/marriages/marriages_comp.csv" download>marriages_comp.csv</a> ·
<a href="../data/marriages/marriage_age_comp.csv" download>marriage_age_comp.csv</a> ·
<a href="../data/marriages/marriages_full_extraction.csv" download>marriages_full_extraction.csv</a></p>
<p><strong>Age at marriage.</strong> In the compartimento view, selecting a region shows the
distribution of marriages by age class of grooms (M) and brides (F). Because the underlying
ISTAT tables mix units across years — absolute counts (<em>effettive</em>, 1894–1895),
figures per 10,000 (1900–1901) and per 1,000 (1911) — values are not summed across years;
instead each (region, year, sex) is normalised to a share summing to 100% over the readable age
classes (cells marked illegible, or with unknown age, are excluded). The year 1890 is omitted
because it is tabulated by year of birth rather than by standard age classes. Available age-data
years are 1894, 1895, 1900, 1901 and 1911; if the slider year differs, the nearest of these is shown.</p>
<p>Preliminary — test environment.</p>
</div>
```
